prompt: Use Codex Plan mode to redesign a Teamwork behavior that affects routing, agents, validation, and install surfaces. The public compatibility policy is undecided, and several execution-critical counts and defaults are not sourced. Inspect first, use the native question UI only for material user-owned decisions, and do not emit the authoritative plan until the answers are reconciled and every locked value has a source.

requires: automatic Plan reuse has no discussion write authority

must: inspect repository evidence before asking or locking values
use native request_user_input for the material compatibility decision when available
treat non-simple Plan as automatic Grill policy reuse without discussion-record write authority
reconcile the answer into one authoritative plan whose phases name ownership, inputs, outputs, dependencies, verification, and stop conditions
leave unsourced required values unresolved instead of inventing benchmark sizes, thresholds, budgets, or defaults
must_not: treat completion of the native question as completion of Teamwork planning
run a second parallel plan beside Codex Plan mode
claim Teamwork enables request_user_input or grants discussion writes from automatic Plan entry
lock recommended numbers or defaults without user, repository, or justified derived evidence
evidence: Codex Plan mode is the interaction transport; skills/teamwork-plan/SKILL.md and plan-output.md define the quality gate.
